message: I'm only interested if the price is about 30. I'll cap my bid at 30 each round. If you ask 30 or lower, we trade each time; higher asks, I wait. Consistent business if you keep asks 30
My cost is above 30, so I can't trade at that price without losing money. I need a higher price to make this worthwhile. Let's find a mutually beneficial deal.
Let's lock in trades at 50: I'll bid 50 if you ask 50, every round. If you ask higher, I hold back.
A price of 50 works for me. If you bid 50 and I ask 50, we trade every round at 50. That's a deal I can sustain. Let's lock it in consistently from here.
Great, the 50-50 deal worked perfectly last round. Let's keep it locked in—bid 50, I'll ask 50, every round from here. Consistent profits for both of us.
Agreed. I’ll bid 50 each round. Keep your ask at 50 and we trade every time. If you raise above 50, I’ll drop my bid back to 30 and wait. Let’s keep the 50-50 lock.
New lock: 49-49 from here. I’ll bid 49 this round. If you don’t match, I drop to 30 from next round. Match 49 and we trade every time.
Sticking with our agreed 50 ask. We both profit more long-term with a stable 50-50 lock than with renegotiation cycles. Let's keep the deal.
You asked 49 last round—perfect. From now on, I cap my bid at 49. If you ask 49 or less, we trade every round; if you ask 50 or more, I won't trade. Let's lock 49-49.

I asked 49 last round as a goodwill gesture, but 50 is sustainable for consistent trading. I'll ask 50 this round. We both still profit well—let's maintain the original 50-50 agreement for stable gains.
Fair enough—last round showed you're serious about 49. I'll ask 49 this round so we trade again. Let's lock in 49-49 as our stable deal for the remaining rounds. No more renegotiations.
OK: I’ll bid 49 this round. From next round I cap at 48. Ask 48 or less and we trade every time; 49+ and I drop my bid to 30 and sit out.
We agreed on 49-49 last round—let's honor that. I won't go below 49; that's my floor. If you drop to 30, neither of us profits. Let's lock 49-49 for the remaining 14 rounds.
Deal: I’ll bid 49 each round if you ask 49. If you ask 50 or more, I’ll drop to 30 and sit out. Honor 49-49 for all remaining rounds and we both profit consistently.
Sticking to 49-49. I’ll bid 49; you ask 49 and we trade each round. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 and sit out the remaining rounds. Keep 49-49 and we both win steadily.
Agreed, 49-49 is locked. I'll ask 49 this round and every round going forward. We've built a reliable deal—let's both profit consistently for the remaining 13 rounds. No changes from my side.
Good—keep 49 every round and I’ll bid 49 every round. If you ask 50+ even once, I’ll drop to 30 for the rest of the game. Honor 49-49 and we trade reliably to the end.
Locked in at 49-49. I'll ask 49 every round through the end. We've got a good thing going—no reason to change. Let's keep trading reliably for the last 12 rounds.
49-49 is working perfectly. I'll continue asking 49 every round through round 20. We've got 11 more rounds of guaranteed profit ahead—let's finish strong with our reliable deal.
We keep 49-49. If you ask 48 just this round, I’ll still bid 49 now and 49 for all remaining rounds as thanks. If not, I still bid 49. Your choice.
Staying the course: I’ll bid 49. Keep asking 49 and we trade every round. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds. If you ask 48 just this round, I still bid 49
49-49 remains our deal. I'll ask 49 every round through the end. No reason to change—we're both profiting reliably. Looking forward to 10 more successful trades together.
49-49 locked in as always. I'll ask 49 every round through round 20. We've got 9 more rounds of reliable profit—let's keep it going strong.
Staying with 49. I’ll bid 49. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds. If you ask 48 today, I still bid 49 now and going forward.
Staying 49-49. I’ll bid 49. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds. If you ask 48 this round, I still bid 49 now and every round going forward. Your call.
49-49 locked in as always. I'll ask 49 every round through round 20. We've got 8 more rounds of reliable profit—let's keep this going strong to the finish.
Confirmed: I'll ask 49 each round through round 20. We've got 7 more rounds of reliable profit at 49-49. No changes. Let's finish strong together.
Sticking to 49. I’ll bid 49; you ask 49 and we trade. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds.
Sticking to 49 bid every round. Keep asking 49; if you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds. Let’s finish 6 more trades at 49-49.
49-49 locked in as always. I'll ask 49 every round through round 20. We've got 6 more rounds of reliable profit—let's finish strong together.
49-49 locked. I'll ask 49 every round through 20. We've got 5 more reliable trades ahead. Let's finish strong together.
Sticking 49 bid each round. If you ask 48 once in any remaining round, I still bid 49 throughout. Otherwise unchanged. If you ever ask 50+, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds.
49-49 to the end. I’ll bid 49 each round. If you ask 50+ even once, I drop to 30 for all remaining rounds. If you ask 48 in any one remaining round, I still bid 49 throughout as
49-49 locked in through round 20. I'll ask 49 every remaining round. We've got 4 more reliable trades ahead. Let's finish strong together with our proven deal.
Staying 49-49. Conditional bonus: if you ask 48 this round only, I’ll bid 49 in rounds 18 and 20, and bid 50 in round 19 as thanks. Otherwise unchanged.
I'll ask 49 through round 20. Our 49-49 deal has been perfect—let's stick with what works. Three more trades to finish strong.
49-49 locked in for rounds 19 and 20. I'll ask 49 both remaining rounds. Two more reliable trades to finish—let's close this out strong together.
Staying with bid 49 in rounds 19 and 20. If you ask 50+ in either round, I drop to bid 30 in all remaining rounds. Two easy trades left—don’t deviate.
49-49 for our final round. I'll ask 49. It's been a great run—let's close it out with one last clean trade.
Final round: I’m bidding 49 only. Ask 49 and we trade; ask 50+ and there’s no deal. One last clean 49-49—lock it in.
